body.title: T-multi-twm: READING_STEW/FACIA contaminate goal TWM window
body.result: Tagged READING_STEW with category='reading_stew' in ebook_reader.py; fixed FACIA/TOOL_REGISTRY_ROOT pushes to use category='body.motor' kwarg directly instead of burying in metadata dict. 1377 tests pass.
body.description: READING_STEW and FACIA entries in TWM bury GOAL_READY signal. D301 HeartbeatSource._check_twm_trigger_habits queries twm_read() but reading entries dominate. Fix: filter TWM query by category when scanning for habit triggers, reserving goal signals from noise. Files: main.py HeartbeatSource, cortex.py twm_read(). Inertia: MEDIUM.
